flows.name: S1 step 10 — open pending approval task (view-only)
flows.reason: Team Lead inbox empty (0 pending) — no task to open. Lifecycle observation: workflow step routing did not produce a Team Lead approval task at time of run. Cannot capture workflow_step name without seed data.

bugs.title: /approvals/history route missing — 404
bugs.evidence: frontend/app/approvals contains only page.tsx + inbox/page.tsx; no history/page.tsx
bugs.impact: Users cannot review past approval decisions from dedicated history view; history tab may be linked from notifications/emails producing 404s

bugs.title: /approvals/delegations route missing — 404 (API exists)
bugs.evidence: Backend endpoint GET /api/v1/workflow/delegations/my returns 200 and is consumed by inbox page, but no dedicated delegations management page exists
bugs.impact: Team Leads/Managers cannot configure out-of-office delegation through a dedicated UI; only inline 'Delegate' action on inbox exists

rbac_note: Team Lead filter check: inbox correctly shows 0 Pending with no drafts from other roles visible. No P1 RBAC leak observed (but no data to confirm positive filtering either — inbox empty).
